column1: Hey Timothy, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
I'm wondering if I already booked my room and plane ticket can I buy all the add ons and party passes later and how much
Cool I got you. So you have things booked already?
Yes but I booked through Expedia and I don't have any of the excursions and exclusive passes and events. I was wondering if I could buy it separately

Yes I have everything booked for my stay but the thing is all my friends have all the events and excursions you guys offer and I don't have those and was wondering if you sell the party passes and event passes separately and how much
yea we can see what we can do, where did you book/which resort?
word so youre lookin for a party pass just for you?
word whats your email? ill send you the pricing
And is there more events I can buy once I'm there ?
yea you can honestly buy them all when youre there too
may be a tiny bit more expensive in person
Ok and can I buy them now?
will send this in a sec
just sent, did that come through?
word lmk which one you wanna roll with and i'll get it set up
Imma compare with my friends tmr and I'll get back to you if that sounds good
yoo checkin in, did we wanna lock that pass down?
yo checkin in, any update on the squad?
yoo whats up Timothy, we still looking to snag that pass?
sup! we still lookin to get situated for spring break?
whats up Timothy did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
whats good bro. which package are you lookin to do
Wait one sec I'll get back to you tomorrow night same time my bad just matching everything up with friends right now
yoo whats good bro, we wanna lock that option down?
Yo ngl is there anyway chance we could book a room through you any more for the Krystal ???
potentially bro. how any ppl and which dates did we want to do
14-19 and if it's cheaper for 2 I'll do 2 but if it's cheaper for 3 people I'll do three
its cheaper per person for a room of 3
gonna put the request in to pull the room. y'al ready to lock in tonight?
Yes definitely because I mean I was gonna book through multiple sites but everyone says sold out and all our boys are staying there. Also depends on the price
ahh man bro looks like its no longer avail for us either
would you want to look at a diff resort
Yo I got my trip booked still wondering if I can buy the packages from the 16-18 nights.
word bro I got you. 3 night party pass for Cancun right
Yeah does that include the booze cruise or do we miss that day?
should be able to catch the booze cruise still! they'll assign you a date within your travel window when you go to check in and get your tickets
so we wanna do 3 nights, and the booze cruise?
Yeah is there any other things everyone that's going there get
thats about it for event add ons. there are like excursions and stuff that some people do but you can sign up for those on arrival
yoyo! gonna send you this party pass now
you'll be able to meet our on site staff at the Krystal to get all squared away when you arrive
just lmk when youre all ready to lock in
And purchase them where do I go to do this
Word I'll set it up for you in a few. Still 3 ppl?
16-19 of march, 3 nights and booze cruise
It should be like around 300 per person right?
Where do I go the purchase?
I can set that up for you later on today and send the link over
Any chance I could get emailed the link so I can purchase it today
Just really trying to purchase them rightnow so I'm all set when I get there
hey bro, thanks for the patience on this
yea lets get you locked in
yo which school are you from again?
We just purchased the two passes is there anything else I need to do when I get there to get wristbands or anything??
yo! missed your text last night

yes I'll send an email with a breakdown on the next steps. but you have vouchers on your account that you will screenshot and take with you to the Krystal Hotel when you go to check in. while youre there, we have a hospitality desk, blue desk with Go Blue Tours signage. our staff at the desk will help you with the party pass
